title: Crunchy Dutch Chicken Roast
description: A one-pot Dutch dish featuring marjoram and a crunchy crust, perfect for a low-calorie dinner. This recipe combines the flavors of chicken, vegetables, and herbs for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the chicken thighs, skin side up, and cook for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the marjoram, salt, black pepper, and paprika over the chicken and vegetables.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and roast for 30 minutes.
Remove the Dutch oven from the oven and sprinkle the parmesan cheese over the top.
Return the Dutch oven to the oven and roast for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the crust is golden brown.
Remove the Dutch oven from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
